question_redacted: How do I set up autopay?
answer:
You can set up our free autopay service from the payment center. You can choose a date between the 1st and 16th of the month, but you won't be able to schedule same-day autopay. For example, you can set up autopay on January 6 to start on January 7. But you can't set up autopay on January 6 to start on January 6.

To be eligible, you must be caught up on all previous months' payments and due for the current month. For example, to set up autopay for February, you'll need to have paid January's payment and be due for February.

We also offer a biweekly autopay option. To set that up, go to the payment center and follow these steps:
1. Make sure you're paid ahead, meaning you've already paid next month's payment.
2. Choose a date between the 1st and 14th of next month.
3. A half payment will draft every 14 days from the date you select.

question_redacted: What happens to my escrow when I pay off my mortgage?
answer: When you pay off your mortgage, any money remaining in your escrow account will be refunded to you. Typically, this refund is issued as a check. If you are refinancing with Rocket Mortgage, you can also choose to apply the remaining escrow balance to reduce the principal balance of your new loan.
